items.title: [CISA KEV] SolarWinds Serv-U - SolarWinds Serv-U Uncontrolled Resource Consumption Vulnerability
items.raw_content:
CVE: CVE-2026-28318
廠商: SolarWinds
產品: Serv-U
漏洞名稱: SolarWinds Serv-U Uncontrolled Resource Consumption Vulnerability
說明: SolarWinds Serv-U contains an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability that allows specially crafted POST requests using the Content-Encoding: deflate header to crash the Serv-U service without authentication.
CISA 要求措施: Apply mitigations per vendor instructions, follow applicable BOD 22-01 guidance for cloud services, or discontinue use of the product if mitigations are unavailable.
修補截止日: 2026-06-19
已知勒索軟體利用: Unknown
